patches.find: ±2 µGal per-station uncertainty bands the dome publishes
patches.replace: ±1.2 µGal per-station uncertainty bands (propagating the dome’s ±2 nT magnetic bands through κ=1.677 nT/µGal)
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c6 H1 moderate: dome publishes ±1.0-2.6 nT (magnetic), not µGal. Propagating ±2 nT through κ=1.677 nT/µGal yields ±1.19 µGal ≈ ±1.2 µGal. Conclusion still holds but original ±2 µGal citation overstated by ~68%.
